mapper.sql: select v.version_id, v.scene_id, s.scene_code, s.scene_name, s.business_domain, v.version_no, v.version_status, v.publish_desc, v.validation_result_json, v.snapshot_hash, v.published_by, v.published_time, v.activated_by, v.activated_time, v.rollback_by, v.rollback_time, v.create_by, v.create_time, v.update_by, v.update_time, case when s.active_version_id = v.version_id then 1 else 0 end as active_flag, (select pv.version_id from cost_publish_version pv where pv.scene_id = v.scene_id and pv.version_id < v.version_id order by pv.version_id desc limit 1) as previous_version_id, (select pv.version_no from cost_publish_version pv where pv.scene_id = v.scene_id and pv.version_id < v.version_id order by pv.version_id desc limit 1) as previous_version_no from cost_publish_version v left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = v.scene_id
mapper.select: order by v.published_time desc, v.version_id desc

select count(distinct v.scene_id) as sceneCount, count(1) as versionCount, coalesce(sum(case when v.version_status = 'ACTIVE' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as activeVersionCount, coalesce(sum(case when v.version_status = 'ROLLED_BACK' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as rolledBackVersionCount from cost_publish_version v left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = v.scene_id
select count(1) from cost_publish_version where scene_id = #{sceneId} and version_no like concat(#{versionPrefix}, '%')

select f.fee_id as feeId, f.fee_code as feeCode, f.fee_name as feeName from cost_fee_item f left join cost_rule r on r.fee_id = f.fee_id and r.status = '0' where f.scene_id = #{sceneId} and f.status = '0' group by f.fee_id, f.fee_code, f.fee_name having count(r.rule_id) = 0 order by f.sort_no asc, f.fee_id asc

select r.rule_id as ruleId, r.rule_code as ruleCode, r.rule_name as ruleName from cost_rule r left join cost_rule_tier t on t.rule_id = r.rule_id left join cost_fee_item f on f.fee_id = r.fee_id where r.scene_id = #{sceneId} and r.status = '0' and r.rule_type = 'TIER_RATE' and f.status = '0' group by r.rule_id, r.rule_code, r.rule_name having count(t.tier_id) = 0 order by r.priority desc, r.sort_no asc, r.rule_id asc

select r.rule_code as ruleCode, r.rule_name as ruleName, f.fee_code as feeCode, f.fee_name as feeName, c.group_no as groupNo, c.sort_no as sortNo, c.variable_code as variableCode, c.display_name as displayName, c.operator_code as operatorCode, c.compare_value as compareValue, c.status as status, c.remark as remark from cost_rule_condition c join cost_rule r on r.rule_id = c.rule_id and r.status = '0' join cost_fee_item f on f.fee_id = r.fee_id and f.status = '0' where c.scene_id = #{sceneId} order by f.sort_no asc, r.priority desc, r.sort_no asc, c.group_no asc, c.sort_no asc, c.condition_id asc

select r.rule_code as ruleCode, r.rule_name as ruleName, f.fee_code as feeCode, f.fee_name as feeName, t.tier_no as tierNo, t.start_value as startValue, t.end_value as endValue, t.rate_value as rateValue, t.interval_mode as intervalMode, t.status as status, t.remark as remark from cost_rule_tier t join cost_rule r on r.rule_id = t.rule_id and r.status = '0' join cost_fee_item f on f.fee_id = r.fee_id and f.status = '0' where t.scene_id = #{sceneId} order by f.sort_no asc, r.priority desc, r.sort_no asc, t.tier_no asc, t.tier_id asc
